data.title: besrey 5 in 1 Toddler Bike for 1 Year to 4 Years Old Kids, Toddler Tricycle Kids Trikes Tricycle, Toys for Boy & Girl, Balanc

features: Wider Use Ages: This upgraded kids tricycle has an enlarged body size so that can be used for a wider range of ages. One besrey toddler bike can meet your kid's all requirements at different ages
help your baby quickly learn to ride. The best first bike for your baby
Double Care: We specially adopted a Curved Carbon Steel Frame Structure + No Edges Design
which can buffer the transmission of vibration and minimize the risk of injury during riding
so as to better keep the safety of your baby
Easy to Install & Use: The structure frame is simple
just refer to the attached manual
you can easily assemble it in a few minutes. One-click deformation
quick-disassembly pedal allows kids easy to switch riding mode randomly
Sturdy and Safe: Sturdy carbon steel frame make the tricycle stable and durable. Non-slip handrail Limited 70° steering to prevent rollover
the widen and fully-enclosed wheel protect your child from falling or slipping whether on the road
in the yard or in the garden. Ensure full protection for kids playing inside or outdoor.
ergonomically designed saddle with PU surface gives the max riding comfort
while the rubber handlebar provides anti-slip grid and smooth bearing of the rear wheels reduces resistance when riding
